title: Crispy Smoked Middle Eastern Almond Stir-fry
description: A creamy and bitter post-workout dish featuring halal-friendly smoked almonds and double cream, served as a dessert.

ingredients.name: smoked almonds
ingredients.notes: halal-friendly, ensure they are smoked properly and meet halal standards

instructions: Melt the double cream in a pan over low heat, stirring occasionally to prevent burning.
Add salted caramel sauce and bitter chocolate to the melted cream and stir until smooth. Let it cool slightly.
Place smoked almonds on a baking sheet and sprinkle with bittersweet chocolate chunks. Bake at 200°C (400°F) for about 15 minutes or until golden brown.
Once cooled, fold the cooled almond-chocolate mixture into the melted cream mixture.
Pour the mix onto a greased pan to form thin layers and place in a preheated oven at 180°C (360°F) for about 15-20 minutes or until golden brown on top.
Remove from heat, let it cool slightly before serving as a dessert.
